machine.title: The order lifecycle, and what it must never do

S1-no-delivery-without-charge.text: Never deliver an order that was never charged

S2-charged-implies-post-charge.text: Never mark an order charged before the charge step

L1-cancellable-until-charged.text: An order stays cancellable until it is charged (reachability — checked separately)

counterexample.title: The gate wrote its own reproduction
counterexample.subtitle: I deleted the guard that blocks ship() until the charge succeeds. Then I asked the gate.
counterexample.violationDetail: With the charge guard removed, the gate drove a never-charged order all the way to delivered().

compat.title: State outlives its code
compat.subtitle: The bug isn't in the new code. It's in the state the old code already left behind.
